title: KUAC Friends Group Among Rasmuson Foundation Awardees
summary: The largest slate of grant awards in Rasmuson Foundation’s 66-year history will support Alaska projects from Kotzebue to Ketchikan, promoting economic development, recreational opportunities, educational programs for children and more. The KUAC Friends Group was approved for $126,229 toward replacin...

title: Thank you Greater Public Challenge donors!
summary: KUAC would like to recognize the generous donors who contributed to the Greater Public challenge fund, which matches donors’ gifts from NEW donors throughout the Fall Fundraiser.
